name: Guest Engine
description: Two-sided guest placement and production platform for podcast and live show hosts and guests. Get booked, get produced, get everywhere.

guest_booking.description: Book guest appearances on live shows across the MITL Live Network

guest_profiles.description: Create and manage permanent, SEO-indexed guest profiles

host_listing.description: List your show and receive AI-matched guest candidates

content_production.description: Full post-appearance content production: clips, social posts, transcripts, highlight reels

ai_producer.description: Sophia AI producer handles prep, booking, and green room briefing

authentication.notes: Guest profiles are publicly browsable. Booking requires account creation.
